title: Causal Synergy Curve reproducibility archive
description: Stan models, R scripts, analytic NHANES illustration file, and codebook accompanying the Statistics in Medicine submission: The Causal Synergy Curve: Bayesian Estimation of Gap-Closure Architecture Across Modifiable Domains.

creators.name: Kypriotakis, George
creators.affiliation: The University of Texas MD Anderson Cancer Center

notes: Compiled Stan executables, posterior draw CSV files, intermediate logs, and platform-specific worker scripts are omitted because they are transient artifacts that can be regenerated from the supplied source code.
